item.title: Anand Rathi Wealth Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Growth Masks Rising Employee Costs
item.description: Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd. delivered a robust 40.35% year-on-year jump in consolidated net profit to ₹103.09 crores for Q4 FY26, marking its strongest quarterly performance to date. However, the wealth management firm's operating margins contracted sharply to a seven-quarter low of 29.46%, weighed down by a significant surge in employee costs that rose 66.62% year-on-year to ₹168.50 crores. The stock surged 4.42% to ₹3,548.00 following the results announcement, extending its remarkable 101.01% gain over the past year, though investors remain cautious about the sustainability of profitability amidst escalating cost pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Krishana Phoschem Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Rising Interest Burden
item.description: Krishana Phoschem Ltd., a Bhilwara-based manufacturer of fertilisers and intermediate dyes, delivered a robust performance in Q4 FY26 with net profit surging 149.37% quarter-on-quarter to ₹83.08 crores, driven by exceptional revenue growth and a negative tax charge. However, beneath the headline numbers lies a concerning trend of escalating interest costs that threatens margin sustainability. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: G M Breweries Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Recovery Masks Margin Compression Concerns
item.description: G M Breweries Ltd., Maharashtra's largest country liquor manufacturer, delivered a mixed performance in Q4 FY26 (January-March 2026), with net profit rebounding sharply by 28.71% quarter-on-quarter to ₹54.07 crores, yet revealing underlying margin pressures that merit investor attention. The ₹2,408 crore market capitalisation company, trading at ₹998.80 per share as of April 9, 2026, saw its stock decline 3.26% following the results announcement, reflecting market concerns over operational efficiency despite the headline profit growth. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sakar Healthcare Added to MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Quarterly Performance
item.description: Sakar Healthcare, a micro-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 09 April 2026, reflecting its remarkable financial turnaround and robust momentum. The company’s recent quarterly results demonstrate exceptional growth across key metrics, positioning it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking dynamic momentum plays in the current market cycle. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Jindal Leasefin Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Jindal Leasefin Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a positive turnaround with a net profit of ₹1.18 crores, up from a loss in the previous quarter, but ongoing structural issues and zero net sales raise concerns about sustainability. Despite a strong stock performance over the past year, caution is advised due to operational challenges and lack of clarity in revenue generation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: SMC Global Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: SMC Global Securities Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Bonlon Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Bonlon Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non-Ferrous Metals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Apollo Pipes Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Strong Recent Rally
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Apollo Pipes Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. While this technical event often signals a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that warrants careful analysis. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Manaksia Aluminium Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: RDB Infrastructure and Power Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: RDB Infrastructure and Power Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and long-term weakness in the stock’s price action. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Arex Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 95.5 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Arex Industries Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 95.5 on 9 Apr 2026. This marks a 45.4% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 175, underscoring a sustained downtrend amid broader market volatility. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with monthly momentum indicators showing mild bearishness despite weekly signals supporting the crossover. This divergence invites a closer look at whether the golden cross stands as a reliable indicator or a lone beacon amid mixed data. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: TCI Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: TCI Finance Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Kennametal India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Kennametal India Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. While this is traditionally viewed as a bullish technical event, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that calls for careful analysis. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Precot Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: A sustained rally of over 70% in three months has propelled the 50-day moving average above the 200-day for Precot Ltd, signalling a golden cross. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with some monthly indicators showing mild bearishness despite daily and weekly bullishness. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Orosil Smiths India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Orosil Smiths India Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 09 Apr 2026. Yet, the daily price action and some technical indicators present a nuanced picture that tempers the enthusiasm around this classic bullish signal. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Kesar India Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Growth Masks Revenue Volatility Concerns
item.description: Kesar India Ltd., a small-cap realty player with a market capitalisation of ₹3,360 crores, reported consolidated net profit of ₹14.54 crores in Q4 FY26, representing a remarkable year-on-year surge of 570.05% compared to ₹1.60 crores in Q4 FY25. However, the quarter witnessed a sequential decline of 5.22% from Q3 FY26's ₹15.34 crores, raising questions about sustainability amid highly volatile quarterly revenue patterns. Time: 3 hours ago
